# SSH 多步骤部署
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 从文件加载部署计划
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "deploy", "plan": "/path/to/deploy.json"}

# 内联部署计划 (plan_json)
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "deploy", "plan_json": "{\"steps\": [{\"name\": \"stop old\", \"type\": \"cmd\", \"cmd\": \"pkill app || true\", \"timeout\": \"10s\"}, {\"name\": \"upload\", \"type\": \"upload_atomic\", \"local_path\": \"./app\", \"remote_path\": \"/opt/app/app\", \"temp_path\": \"/opt/app/app.tmp\"}, {\"name\": \"chmod\", \"type\": \"chmod\", \"remote_path\": \"/opt/app/app\", \"mode\": \"0755\"}, {\"name\": \"start\", \"type\": \"cmd\", \"cmd\": \"cd /opt/app && setsid -f ./app > logs/app.log 2>&1\", \"timeout\": \"15s\"}]}"}
aitk SSH_

# continue_on_error: 步骤失败后继续执行
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "deploy", "plan_json": "{\"steps\": [{\"name\": \"check\", \"type\": \"cmd\", \"cmd\": \"uname -s\"}, {\"name\": \"may fail but continue\", \"type\": \"cmd\", \"cmd\": \"ls /nonexistent\", \"continue_on_error\": true}, {\"name\": \"still runs\", \"type\": \"cmd\", \"cmd\": \"echo ok\"}]}"}
aitk SSH_
